name: [WhatsApp] Process human-approved response for WA SDR Agent

value.original_message_ts: ={{ DateTime.fromMillis(Number($('Parse Slack Payload').item.json.original_message_ts) * 1000).toFormat('MMM dd, yyyy HH:mm') }}

parameters.content:
### Setup Required
1. Configure documentId on both Log nodes — select 'Outbound SDR Training Data' sheet, tab: response
2. Verify bird_message_id field name from a live Bird API response (Log Approved node uses $('Respond to Prospect').item.json.id)

conditions.leftValue: ={{ (() => { const p = $json.body.payload; const parsed = typeof p === 'string' ? JSON.parse(p) : p; return parsed.type; })() }}
